zh-cn.kojo_default_com_job_farm_maintain_accep: $self$ 一边哼着歌，一边认真地给作物浇水施肥。
$self$："完了，刚才除草的时候，不小心把菜苗也拔掉了！"
zh-cn.com_job_farm_maintain_Begin_1: $self$ 眼睛一亮，立刻跳了起来。"好啊！我正想去看看那边的草莓长得怎么样了！"
zh-cn.com_job_farm_maintain_Begin_2: $self$ 利落地挽起头发。"没问题，正好我也需要活动活动筋骨，走吧！"
zh-cn.com_job_farm_maintain_Begin_3: $self$ 咬着下唇，眼神中充满了抗拒，但还是颤巍巍地站了起来。"我知道了……我会去的……请别生气。"
zh-cn.com_job_farm_maintain_Begin_4: $self$ 低着头，不敢直视$target$的眼睛，声音细若蚊蝇。"只要我去……你就不会那样对我了吗？……好。"
zh-cn.com_job_farm_maintain_Begin_5: $self$ 愣了一下，指了指自己。"诶？我也要去吗？……好吧，既然你都这么说了。"
zh-cn.com_job_farm_maintain_Begin_6: $self$ 挠了挠头，有些困惑。"我不太擅长那个……不过如果你坚持的话，我可以试试。"
zh-cn.com_job_farm_maintain_Begin_7: $self$ 换上了一双耐脏的长靴，把帽檐压低了一些。"好了，今天要把这片杂草清理干净。"
zh-cn.com_job_farm_maintain_Begin_8: $self$ 深吸了一口带着泥土芬芳的空气，拿起了放在墙角的喷壶。"这些小家伙应该渴坏了。"
zh-cn.com_job_farm_maintain_Begin_9: $self$ 挽起袖子，露出白皙的小臂，眼神在田垄间扫视。"嗯……先从修剪枯枝开始吧。"
zh-cn.com_job_farm_maintain_Begin_10: $self$ 拍了拍脸颊给自己打气，提着沉甸甸的肥料袋走向田地。
zh-cn.com_job_farm_maintain_Tryjoin_1: $self$ 看着忙碌的$target$，有些手痒地凑了过去。"看起来挺有意思的，我也能来帮把手吗？"
zh-cn.com_job_farm_maintain_Tryjoin_2: $self$ 提着自己的小工具箱走近。"那个……如果不介意的话，我可以负责那边的除草工作。"
zh-cn.com_job_farm_maintain_Joined_1: $self$ 开心地比了个胜利的手势。"太好了！那这片区域就交给我吧！"
zh-cn.com_job_farm_maintain_Joined_2: $self$ 立刻投入了工作，显得干劲十足。"谢啦！我会让你刮目相看的。"
zh-cn.com_job_farm_maintain_Join_Refused_1: $self$ 失落地垂下肩膀，踢了踢路边的小石子。"什么嘛……小气鬼。"
zh-cn.com_job_farm_maintain_Join_Refused_2: $self$ 尴尬地收回手，强颜欢笑。"啊，这样啊……那我就不打扰你了，加油哦。"
zh-cn.com_job_farm_maintain_Join_1: $self$ 擦了把汗，笑着摇摇头。"谢谢你的好意，不过这片地我已经快弄完了，你在旁边歇着就好。"
zh-cn.com_job_farm_maintain_Join_2: $self$ 温柔地推开$target$伸过来的手。"别弄脏手了，这点小事我自己能搞定。"
zh-cn.com_job_farm_maintain_Join_3: $self$ 警惕地护住身下的幼苗。"别碰！你根本不懂怎么弄，只会帮倒忙。"
zh-cn.com_job_farm_maintain_Join_4: $self$ 不耐烦地挥手像赶苍蝇一样。"走开走开，你在这里只会碍手碍脚。"
zh-cn.com_job_farm_maintain_Join_5: $self$ 惊喜地递过一把铲子。"求之不得！我都快累死了，快来帮帮我！"
zh-cn.com_job_farm_maintain_Join_6: $self$ 往旁边挪了挪位置，拍了拍身边的空地。"来得正好，两个人干活肯定快多了。"
zh-cn.com_job_farm_maintain_Join_7: $self$ 身体僵硬了一下，默默地往旁边退开。"这是你的地盘……你想怎么样都可以……"
zh-cn.com_job_farm_maintain_Join_8: $self$ 不敢反驳，只能低头继续手中的动作，尽量减少存在感。"如果你坚持的话……请便……"
zh-cn.com_job_farm_maintain_Join_9: $self$ 有些惊讶地眨了眨眼。"你是认真的吗？这可是很累的脏活……随你便吧。"
zh-cn.com_job_farm_maintain_Join_10: $self$ 迟疑了一下，还是把多余的手套递了过去。"没想到你会对这个感兴趣……好吧。"
zh-cn.com_job_farm_maintain_Ongoing_1: $self$ 蹲在作物旁，专注地查看着叶片背面的虫卵，额头上沁出细密的汗珠
zh-cn.com_job_farm_maintain_Ongoing_2: $self$ 有节奏地挥动着锄头，翻开湿润的泥土，嘴里哼着不知名的小调
zh-cn.com_job_farm_maintain_Ongoing_3: $self$ 小心翼翼地用剪刀去除多余的侧芽，动作轻柔得像是在对待易碎的艺术品
zh-cn.com_job_farm_maintain_Ongoing_4: $self$ 提着水桶穿梭在田垄间，清澈的水流随着她的动作均匀地洒在根部
zh-cn.com_job_farm_maintain_Interrupt_1: $self$ 听到脚步声猛地颤抖了一下，手中的铲子差点掉落在地，眼神闪烁地看向$target$。"我……我正在努力工作，没有偷懒……"
zh-cn.com_job_farm_maintain_Interrupt_2: $self$ 下意识地退后半步，把自己缩在茂密的玉米秆阴影里。"请、请不要过来……这里都是泥……"
zh-cn.com_job_farm_maintain_Interrupt_3: $self$ 手中的剪刀发出咔嚓一声脆响，冷冷地瞥了$target$一眼。"如果你是来捣乱的，我手里的家伙可不长眼睛。"
zh-cn.com_job_farm_maintain_Interrupt_4: $self$ 没有停下手中的活，只是背对着$target$啧了一声。"真晦气，这片田里的害虫好像变多了。"
zh-cn.com_job_farm_maintain_Interrupt_5: $self$ 直起腰，看到$target$时露出了灿烂的笑容，举起沾满泥土的手挥了挥。"嘿！你看！番茄已经开始变红了！"
zh-cn.com_job_farm_maintain_Interrupt_6: $self$ 擦了擦汗，眼神温柔地注视着走近的$target$。"你怎么来了？小心别踩到刚播下的种子。"
zh-cn.com_job_farm_maintain_Interrupt_7: $self$ 故意挺直了身体，让汗水顺着脖颈滑入衣领深处，眼神迷离地望向$target$。"在这种地方见面……你是想看我满身大汗的样子吗？"
zh-cn.com_job_farm_maintain_Interrupt_8: $self$ 咬着嘴唇，用带着泥土腥味的手指轻轻勾弄着自己的领口。"比起照顾这些植物……我更想让你来‘照顾’一下我呢……"
zh-cn.com_job_farm_maintain_Interrupt_9: $self$ 只是淡淡地点了点头，算是打过招呼，随即又低头继续摆弄手中的幼苗。"如果不帮忙的话，请站远一点。"
zh-cn.com_job_farm_maintain_Interrupt_10: $self$ 有些意外地挑了挑眉，语气平淡。"借过一下，你挡住阳光了。"
zh-cn.com_job_farm_maintain_1: $self$ 歉意地笑了笑，指了指自己干净的衣服。"抱歉，$target$，我刚洗完澡，实在不想弄脏了。"
zh-cn.com_job_farm_maintain_2: $self$ 摆了摆手。"今天腰有点酸，我就不去凑热闹了，祝你们丰收。"
zh-cn.com_job_farm_maintain_3: $self$ 翻了个白眼，嫌弃地看了一眼$target$指甲里的泥土。"在那大太阳底下暴晒？你是想毁了我的皮肤吗？"
zh-cn.com_job_farm_maintain_4: $self$ 冷笑一声。"这种粗活还是你自己干吧，别把我想象成廉价劳动力。"
zh-cn.com_job_farm_maintain_5: $self$ 看着整齐划一的田垄，满意地叉起腰。"完美！看来今年的收成不用发愁了！"
zh-cn.com_job_farm_maintain_6: $self$ 捧起一颗刚摘下的果实，脸上洋溢着成就感。"这就是劳动的汗水换来的甜美啊！"
zh-cn.com_job_farm_maintain_7: $self$ 虽然完成了目标，但看着指甲里的污垢，眉头紧锁。"下次绝对不干这种活了，累得腰都快断了。"
zh-cn.com_job_farm_maintain_8: $self$ 把工具重重地扔进箱子里，揉着酸痛的肩膀。"终于结束了……付出的代价完全不值得。"
zh-cn.com_job_farm_maintain_9: $self$ 看着枯萎的叶子，无奈地笑了笑，却并没有太沮丧。"虽然失败了，但在阳光下流汗的感觉还不坏嘛。"
zh-cn.com_job_farm_maintain_10: $self$ 拍了拍身上的泥土。"至少学到了怎么施肥，下次一定能种好的！"
zh-cn.com_job_farm_maintain_11: $self$ 看着被虫子啃食殆尽的叶片，气得眼眶发红。"我明明那么努力了……为什么还是救不活它们！"
zh-cn.com_job_farm_maintain_12: $self$ 颓废地坐在田埂上，把枯枝折断。"浪费了整整一下午……我真是个笨蛋。"

en-us.kojo_default_com_job_farm_maintain_accep: $self$ hummed a song as they carefully watered and fertilized the crops.
$self$: "Oops, I accidentally pulled out the vegetable seedlings thinking they were weeds!"
en-us.com_job_farm_maintain_Begin_1: $self$'s eyes lit up and she jumped up immediately. "Sure! I was just thinking about checking on how the strawberries over there are doing!"
en-us.com_job_farm_maintain_Begin_2: $self$ tied up her hair briskly. "No problem, I needed to stretch my limbs anyway. Let's go!"
en-us.com_job_farm_maintain_Begin_3: $self$ bit her lower lip, her eyes filled with resistance, but she stood up tremblingly. "I understand... I will go... Please don't be angry."
en-us.com_job_farm_maintain_Begin_4: $self$ lowered her head, not daring to look straight into $target$'s eyes, her voice as faint as a mosquito. "As long as I go... you won't do *that* to me? ...Okay."
en-us.com_job_farm_maintain_Begin_5: $self$ paused for a moment and pointed at herself. "Eh? I have to go too? ...Alright, since you said so."
en-us.com_job_farm_maintain_Begin_6: $self$ scratched her head, looking a bit confused. "I'm not very good at that... but if you insist, I can give it a try."
en-us.com_job_farm_maintain_Begin_7: $self$ put on a pair of durable boots and pulled her hat brim lower. "Alright, time to clean up all these weeds today."
en-us.com_job_farm_maintain_Begin_8: $self$ took a deep breath of the earthy air and picked up the watering can from the corner. "These little guys must be thirsty."
en-us.com_job_farm_maintain_Begin_9: $self$ rolled up her sleeves to reveal her fair forearms, scanning the fields. "Hmm... let's start by trimming the dead branches."
en-us.com_job_farm_maintain_Begin_10: $self$ patted her cheeks to psyche herself up and walked towards the field carrying a heavy bag of fertilizer.
en-us.com_job_farm_maintain_Tryjoin_1: $self$ looked at the busy $target$ and leaned in, itching to join. "That looks interesting, can I lend a hand too?"
en-us.com_job_farm_maintain_Tryjoin_2: $self$ approached with her small toolbox. "Um... if you don't mind, I can take care of the weeding over there."
en-us.com_job_farm_maintain_Joined_1: $self$ made a victory sign happily. "Great! Leave this area to me then!"
en-us.com_job_farm_maintain_Joined_2: $self$ immediately threw herself into work, looking full of energy. "Thanks! I'll show you what I can do."
en-us.com_job_farm_maintain_Join_Refused_1: $self$ dropped her shoulders in disappointment and kicked a pebble on the roadside. "What... stingy."
en-us.com_job_farm_maintain_Join_Refused_2: $self$ withdrew her hand awkwardly, forcing a smile. "Ah, is that so... well, I won't disturb you then. Good luck."
en-us.com_job_farm_maintain_Join_1: $self$ wiped off some sweat and shook her head with a smile. "Thanks for the offer, $target$, but I'm almost done with this patch. You can just rest nearby."
en-us.com_job_farm_maintain_Join_2: $self$ gently pushed away $target$'s outstretched hand. "Don't get your hands dirty, I can handle this little task myself."
en-us.com_job_farm_maintain_Join_3: $self$ vigilantly protected the seedlings beneath her. "Don't touch! You don't know how to do it at all, you'll just make things worse."
en-us.com_job_farm_maintain_Join_4: $self$ waved her hand impatiently like shooing away a fly. "Go away, go away, you'll only be in the way here."
en-us.com_job_farm_maintain_Join_5: $self$ handed over a shovel with a pleasant surprise. "Just what I needed! I'm exhausted, come help me quickly!"
en-us.com_job_farm_maintain_Join_6: $self$ moved over to make space and patted the empty ground beside her. "Just in time, two people working will definitely be much faster."
en-us.com_job_farm_maintain_Join_7: $self$ stiffened for a moment and silently stepped aside. "This is your territory... you can do whatever you want..."
en-us.com_job_farm_maintain_Join_8: $self$ didn't dare to object, only lowering her head to continue her work, trying to minimize her presence. "If you insist... please, go ahead..."
en-us.com_job_farm_maintain_Join_9: $self$ blinked in surprise. "Are you serious? This is dirty and tiring work... well, suit yourself."
en-us.com_job_farm_maintain_Join_10: $self$ hesitated for a moment before handing over the spare gloves. "I didn't expect you to be interested in this... alright."
en-us.com_job_farm_maintain_Ongoing_1: $self$ squatted beside the crops, intently checking for insect eggs on the undersides of leaves, beads of sweat forming on her forehead.
en-us.com_job_farm_maintain_Ongoing_2: $self$ swung the hoe rhythmically, turning over the moist soil while humming an unknown tune.
en-us.com_job_farm_maintain_Ongoing_3: $self$ carefully removed excess side shoots with scissors, her movements as gentle as if handling a fragile piece of art.
en-us.com_job_farm_maintain_Ongoing_4: $self$ carried buckets of water through the fields, the clear stream sprinkling evenly over the roots with her movements.
en-us.com_job_farm_maintain_Interrupt_1: $self$ trembled violently at the sound of footsteps, almost dropping the shovel, and looked at $target$ with flickering eyes. "I... I'm working hard, I'm not slacking off..."
en-us.com_job_farm_maintain_Interrupt_2: $self$ subconsciously took half a step back, shrinking into the shadow of the dense corn stalks. "P-please don't come over... it's all muddy here..."
en-us.com_job_farm_maintain_Interrupt_3: $self$'s scissors made a crisp snipping sound as she glanced coldly at $target$. "If you're here to cause trouble, the tool in my hand doesn't have eyes."
en-us.com_job_farm_maintain_Interrupt_4: $self$ didn't stop her work, only clicking her tongue with her back to $target$. "Just my luck, seems like there are more pests in this field now."
en-us.com_job_farm_maintain_Interrupt_5: $self$ straightened up and flashed a bright smile upon seeing $target$, waving a muddy hand. "Hey! Look! The tomatoes are starting to turn red!"
en-us.com_job_farm_maintain_Interrupt_6: $self$ wiped her sweat and looked gently at the approaching $target$. "What brings you here? Be careful not to step on the seeds I just sowed."
en-us.com_job_farm_maintain_Interrupt_7: $self$ deliberately straightened her body, letting sweat slide down her neck deep into her collar, looking at $target$ with misty eyes. "Meeting in a place like this... do you want to see me covered in sweat?"
en-us.com_job_farm_maintain_Interrupt_8: $self$ bit her lip, gently hooking her collar with fingers smelling of soil. "Rather than taking care of these plants... I'd prefer you to 'take care' of me..."
en-us.com_job_farm_maintain_Interrupt_9: $self$ just nodded faintly as a greeting, then lowered her head to continue fiddling with the seedlings. "If you're not helping, please stand further away."
en-us.com_job_farm_maintain_Interrupt_10: $self$ raised an eyebrow in slight surprise, her tone flat. "Excuse me, you're blocking the sun."
en-us.com_job_farm_maintain_1: $self$ smiled apologetically and pointed to her clean clothes. "Sorry, $target$, I just showered and really don't want to get dirty."
en-us.com_job_farm_maintain_2: $self$ waved her hand. "My back is a bit sore today, so I won't join the fun. Wishing you a good harvest."
en-us.com_job_farm_maintain_3: $self$ rolled her eyes, looking at the dirt under $target$'s nails with disgust. "Under that blazing sun? Are you trying to ruin my skin?"
en-us.com_job_farm_maintain_4: $self$ sneered. "You'd better do this kind of rough work yourself, don't think of me as cheap labor."
en-us.com_job_farm_maintain_5: $self$ looked at the neatly arranged rows and put her hands on her hips with satisfaction. "Perfect! Looks like we don't have to worry about this year's harvest!"
en-us.com_job_farm_maintain_6: $self$ held up a freshly picked fruit, her face beaming with a sense of achievement. "This is the sweet taste of hard work!"
en-us.com_job_farm_maintain_7: $self$ frowned as she looked at the dirt in her nails, despite having completed the goal. "I'm definitely not doing this again, my waist is breaking."
en-us.com_job_farm_maintain_8: $self$ threw the tools heavily into the box, rubbing her sore shoulders. "Finally over... the cost was totally not worth it."
en-us.com_job_farm_maintain_9: $self$ looked at the withered leaves and smiled helplessly, but wasn't too depressed. "Although it failed, sweating in the sun didn't feel too bad."
en-us.com_job_farm_maintain_10: $self$ patted the dirt off her body. "At least I learned how to fertilize, I'll definitely grow them well next time!"
en-us.com_job_farm_maintain_11: $self$ looked at the leaves eaten by bugs, her eyes turning red with anger. "I tried so hard... why couldn't I save them!"
en-us.com_job_farm_maintain_12: $self$ sat dejectedly on the ridge, breaking a dry twig. "Wasted a whole afternoon... I'm such an idiot."
